title: Integration tests use independent oracle for payload validation
description: relay/tests/dm_tests.rs:11-14, 141-147, 232-236: Both test_dm_live_delivery and test_dm_offline_delivery construct the oracle payload independently using serde_json::to_vec(&ClearMessage::Chat {...}), not by round-tripping through the DM send/receive path. This is load-bearing: tests that encrypt with function X and decrypt with X prove nothing. The independent oracle ensures the test fails if the payload format changes unexpectedly.
